data.content: Implementation review approved. Fix correctly composes includeDescendantsOfQueueParents with includeActiveAncestors in both beads-backend.ts and knots-backend.ts so queued children always surface their ancestor chain. 5 regression tests cover single-parent, deep-chain, and exact-state-filter-guardrail scenarios. All 240 relevant tests pass. No security issues or regressions.
